# Architecture RFC Template

## Purpose

Guide significant architecture proposals.

## Reference When

Use before changing core layers, dependencies, storage, or public contracts.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Architecture changes require explicit tradeoffs.

## Template

```md
# RFC: <title>

Status: proposed
Owner:
Date:

## Context

## Problem

## Goals

## Non-Goals

## Options Considered

## Decision

## Consequences

## Migration Plan

## Rollback Plan

## Open Questions
```
